body: {"detail":"value [undefined] at [root.0.notification_type] is not a valid [NotificationType]\nvalue [undefined] at [root.0.fiscal_code] is not a valid [string that matches the pattern \"^[A-Z]{6}[0-9LMNPQRSTUV]{2}[ABCDEHLMPRST][0-9LMNPQRSTUV]{2}[A-Z][0-9LMNPQRSTUV]{3}[A-Z]$\"]\nvalue [undefined] at [root.0.message_id] is not a valid [non empty string]","status":400,"title":"Invalid NotificationInfo"}
